full_text:
He Zhen (Yuangan) 何楨 (元幹)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Zhen (何楨), styledYuangan (元幹). A large man and poet, friends with Yang Hu. He Zhen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
